metaBuilds.title: Magical Frontline
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for physical survivability, online around minute 24 — about 4,295 effective HP vs physical in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 2% of our best core on physical survivability. The winrate is earned, not luck.

metaBuilds.title: Magical Frontline
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for physical survivability, online around minute 24 — about 4,206 effective HP vs physical in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 4% of our best core on physical survivability. The winrate is earned, not luck.

metaBuilds.title: Magical Brawler
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for extended fights vs bruisers, online around minute 24 — about 4,520 damage over a 20s fight in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +35% more extended fights vs bruisers: try Spectral Schematics over Combustion (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Argus deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their burst combo hits 14% less hard, and this kit gives up 25% of its damage for it.

matchups.gameplan: Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Renna's main threat is Mortal Coil; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their burst combo hits 14% less hard, and this kit gives up 26% of its damage for it.

matchups.gameplan: Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Iggy & Scorch deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their burst combo hits 12% less hard, and this kit gives up 26% of its damage for it.

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands. Gideon deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their burst combo hits 14% less hard, and this kit gives up 25% of its damage for it.

matchups.gameplan: Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Countess deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their burst combo hits 11% less hard, and this kit gives up 28% of its damage for it.

matchups.gameplan: Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Lt. Belica executes low targets with Neural Disruptor — don't linger below half HP.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their burst combo hits 11% less hard, and this kit gives up 28% of its damage for it.

matchups.gameplan: Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Phase's main threat is Energy Lance; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.

Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Riktor ramps on auto-attacks — pressure them before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Zinx's main threat is Ricochet; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.
Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Dekker deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.
Whenever this lane is not even, the winnable fight is yours: play aggressive, but respect jungle attention. Adele deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.
